name: Captrix AI caption generation surface
description: Verifies the AI caption generation surface without forcing CI to download a model.

planSteps.description: data-testid=generate-captions is visible and says captions can be created from speech.
data-testid=transcription-status is visible and invites the user to generate editable captions.
Click data-testid=generate-captions without uploading a video.
The app shows that caption generation needs a loaded clip and does not crash.
